# TitanZero — Full Route Manifest

> Generated by full static scan of all route files.  
> Middleware shown = outermost group + any per-route additions.  
> Route names shown as **fully-qualified** (prefix-chain resolved).

---

## Section 1: Core Route Files

---

### 1.1 `routes/web.php`

**Stack:** `web` · `ViewSharedMiddleware` · `NewExtensionInstalled`  
(loaded by `RouteServiceProvider` inside the `web` middleware group)

| Method | URI | Controller | Route Name | Middleware | Notes |
|--------|-----|------------|------------|------------|-------|
| GET | `language/{lang}/change` | `LocaleController` | `language.change` | — | Invokable |
| ANY | `test` | `TestController@test` | `test` | — | |
| POST | `test` | `TestController@test` | `test.post` | — | |
| GET | `test/stream/{model}` | `TestController@stream` | `test.stream` | — | |
| GET | `test/chatbot` | *(view)* | — | — | View: `default.chatbot` |
| GET | `default` | *(closure)* | `default` | — | Returns 204 |
| GET | `account-deletion` | *(view)* | — | — | View: `default.account-deletion` |
| GET | `` | `IndexController` | `index` | `checkInstallation` | Invokable |
| GET | `privacy-policy` | `PageController@pagePrivacy` | `pagePrivacy` | `checkInstallation` | |
| GET | `terms` | `PageController@pageTerms` | `pageTerms` | `checkInstallation` | |
| GET | `page/{slug}` | `PageController@pageContent` | `pageContent` | `checkInstallation` | |
| GET | `blog` | `BlogController@index` | `blog.index` | `checkInstallation` | |
| GET | `blog/{slug}` | `BlogController@post` | `blog.post` | `checkInstallation` | |
| GET | `blog/tag/{slug}` | `BlogController@tags` | `blog.tags` | `checkInstallation` | |
| GET | `blog/category/{slug}` | `BlogController@categories` | `blog.categories` | `checkInstallation` | |
| GET | `blog/author/{slug}` | `BlogController@author` | `blog.author` | `checkInstallation` | |
| GET | `credit-list-partial` | `PlanAndPricingController@creditListPartial` | `credit-list-partial` | `checkInstallation` | |
| GET | `team-credit-list-partial` | `PlanAndPricingController@teamCreditListPartial` | `team-credit-list-partial` | `checkInstallation` | |
| GET | `sitemap.xml` | `SitemapController@index` | — | — | |
| GET | `plan/private/subscription/{key}` | `PrivatePlanController@index` | — | — | |
| GET | `confirm/email/{email_confirmation_code}` | `MailController@emailConfirmationMail` | — | — | |
| GET | `upgrade-script` | `InstallationController@upgrade` | `upgrade-script` | `withoutMiddleware(ApplicationStatus)` | |
| GET | `update-manual/{pass?}` | `InstallationController@updateManual` | `update-manual` | `withoutMiddleware(ApplicationStatus)` | |
| GET | `cache-clear-menu` | `InstallationController@menuClearCache` | `menuClearCache` | — | |
| POST | `install-extension/{slug}` | `InstallationController@installExtension` | `install-extension` | — | |
| POST | `uninstall-extension/{slug}` | `InstallationController@uninstallExtension` | `uninstall-extension` | — | |
| GET | `clear-log` | `ClearController@clearLog` | `clearLog` | — | |
| GET | `cache-clear` | `ClearController@cacheClear` | `cache.clear` | — | ⚠ Name collision — see §5 |
| GET | `update-fonts` | `FontsController@updateFontsCache` | — | — | |
| GET | `debug/{token?}` | `DebugModeController` | `debug` | — | Invokable |
| GET | `keys/{provider}/{secret}/{newKey}` | `UpdateApiKeyController` | — | `auth`, `admin` | Invokable |
| GET | `check-subscription-end` | `CheckSubscriptionEndController` | `check-subscription-end` | — | Invokable |

*Also conditionally includes `routes/custom_routes_web.php`, then requires `auth.php`, `panel.php`, `webhooks.php`.*

### 1.4 `routes/webhooks.php`

**Stack:** `web` (inherited from web.php require chain)

| Method | URI | Controller | Route Name | Notes |
|--------|-----|------------|------------|-------|
| GET/POST | `webhooks/{gateway}` | `PaymentProcessController@handleWebhook` | — | Under `webhooks.` prefix |
| ANY | `webhooks/stripe/{subscription}/success` | `PaymentProcessController@stripeSuccess` | `webhooks.stripe.success` | ⚠ Defined twice |
| ANY | `webhooks/stripe/{subscription}/cancel` | `PaymentProcessController@stripeCancel` | `webhooks.stripe.cancel` | ⚠ Defined twice |
| ANY | `webhooks/stripe/{plan}/{user}/success/prepaid` | `PaymentProcessController@prepaidStripeSuccess` | `webhooks.stripe.success` | ⚠ Shadowed by above |
| ANY | `webhooks/stripe/cancel/prepaid` | `PaymentProcessController@stripeCancel` | `webhooks.stripe.cancel` | ⚠ Shadowed by above |
| GET/POST | `webhook/{gateway}` | `PaymentProcessController@handleWebhook` | — | Second prefix block: `webhook.` (no `s`) |

---

### 1.6 `routes/core/*.routes.php`

All files loaded alphabetically by `RouteServiceProvider::loadCoreRoutes()`.  
Each file declares its own middleware stack independently (they run inside the RSP's `auth` + `throttle:120,1` wrapper but many re-declare their own groups for clarity).

---

#### 1.6.1 `crm.routes.php`

**Prefix:** `dashboard/crm` · **Name prefix:** `dashboard.crm.`  
**Middleware:** `auth` · `updateUserActivity` · `throttle:120,1`

| Method | URI | Controller | Route Name |
|--------|-----|------------|------------|
| GET | `dashboard/crm/customers` | `Core\Crm\CustomerController@index` | `dashboard.crm.customers.index` |
| POST | `dashboard/crm/customers` | `Core\Crm\CustomerController@store` | `dashboard.crm.customers.store` |
| GET | `dashboard/crm/customers/{customer}` | `Core\Crm\CustomerController@show` | `dashboard.crm.customers.show` |
| PUT | `dashboard/crm/customers/{customer}` | `Core\Crm\CustomerController@update` | `dashboard.crm.customers.update` |
| GET | `dashboard/crm/customers/{customer}/contacts` | `Core\Crm\CustomerContactController@index` | `dashboard.crm.customers.contacts.index` |
| DELETE | `dashboard/crm/customers/{customer}/contacts/{contact}` | `Core\Crm\CustomerContactController@destroy` | `dashboard.crm.customers.contacts.destroy` |
| GET | `dashboard/crm/customers/{customer}/notes` | `Core\Crm\CustomerNoteController@index` | `dashboard.crm.customers.notes.index` |
| POST | `dashboard/crm/customers/{customer}/notes/{note}/pin` | `Core\Crm\CustomerNoteController@togglePin` | `dashboard.crm.customers.notes.pin` |
| GET | `dashboard/crm/customers/{customer}/documents` | `Core\Crm\CustomerDocumentController@index` | `dashboard.crm.customers.documents.index` |
| GET | `dashboard/crm/enquiries` | `Core\Crm\EnquiryController@index` | `dashboard.crm.enquiries.index` |
| POST | `dashboard/crm/enquiries/{enquiry}/convert-to-quote` | `Core\Crm\EnquiryController@convertToQuote` | `dashboard.crm.enquiries.convert-to-quote` |
| POST | `dashboard/crm/enquiries/{enquiry}/convert-to-job` | `Core\Crm\EnquiryController@convertToServiceJob` | `dashboard.crm.enquiries.convert-to-job` |

*(Full CRUD omitted for brevity; all follow the pattern above.)*

*Second group uses `ValidateZylosSignature` + `throttle:120,1`.*

| `dashboard.money.bank-accounts.*` | Full CRUD + `set-default` |
| `dashboard.money.taxes.*` | Full CRUD + `set-default` |
| `dashboard.money.expense-categories.*` | Full CRUD |

## Section 2: Route Provider Loading

| Provider | Registers Routes? | Method | Files Loaded |
|----------|------------------|--------|--------------|
| `RouteServiceProvider` | ✅ Yes | `$this->routes(callback)` | `routes/api.php` (middleware: `api`, prefix: `api`) |
| `RouteServiceProvider` | ✅ Yes | `$this->routes(callback)` | `routes/web.php` (middleware: `web`, `ViewSharedMiddleware`, `NewExtensionInstalled`) |
| `RouteServiceProvider` | ✅ Yes | `loadCoreRoutes()` via glob | All `routes/core/*.routes.php` (within `auth` + `throttle:120,1` context) |
| `BroadcastServiceProvider` | ✅ Yes | `require` | `routes/channels.php` |
| `ExtensionServiceProvider` | ❌ No | Delegates to sub-providers | Registers only `ChatbotServiceProvider` |
| `TitanCoreServiceProvider` | ❌ No | Singletons only | No route registration |
| `TitanPwaServiceProvider` | ❌ No | Singletons only | No route registration |
| `TitanSignalsServiceProvider` | ❌ No | Singletons only | No route registration |
| `WorkCoreServiceProvider` | ❌ No | Config + singleton | No route registration |

**Notes:**
- `web.php` uses `require` to chain `auth.php`, `panel.php`, and `webhooks.php` — these inherit the web middleware group.
- `panel.php` loads `routes/extroutes/*.php` dynamically (directory **does not exist** — silent no-op).
- `api.php` loads `routes/extapiroutes/*.php` dynamically (directory **does not exist** — silent no-op).
- `web.php` conditionally includes `custom_routes_web.php` and `auth.php` includes `custom_routes_auth.php` — neither file exists currently (silent no-op).

---

## Section 3: Route Bindings

All defined in `RouteServiceProvider::boot()`:

| Binding Key | Model | Lookup |
|-------------|-------|--------|
| `customer` | `App\Models\Crm\Customer` | `whereKey($value)->firstOrFail()` |
| `enquiry` | `App\Models\Crm\Enquiry` | `whereKey($value)->firstOrFail()` |
| `site` | `App\Models\Work\Site` | `whereKey($value)->firstOrFail()` |
| `job` | `App\Models\Work\ServiceJob` | `whereKey($value)->firstOrFail()` |
| `checklist` | `App\Models\Work\Checklist` | `whereKey($value)->firstOrFail()` |
| `quote` | `App\Models\Money\Quote` | `whereKey($value)->firstOrFail()` |
| `invoice` | `App\Models\Money\Invoice` | `whereKey($value)->firstOrFail()` |
| `payment` | `App\Models\Money\Payment` | `whereKey($value)->firstOrFail()` |
| `case` | `App\Extensions\TitanRewind\System\Models\RewindCase` | `whereKey($value)->firstOrFail()` |
| `zone` | `App\Models\Work\ServiceArea` | `whereKey($value)->firstOrFail()` |
| `service_area_region` | `App\Models\Work\ServiceAreaRegion` | `whereKey($value)->firstOrFail()` |
| `service_area_district` | `App\Models\Work\ServiceAreaDistrict` | `whereKey($value)->firstOrFail()` |
| `service_area_branch` | `App\Models\Work\ServiceAreaBranch` | `whereKey($value)->firstOrFail()` |

---

## Section 4: Panel Route Naming Pattern

### Dominant Convention

The panel (`panel.php` + all `core/*.routes.php`) uses:

```
dashboard.{area}.{resource}.{action}
```

Examples:
- `dashboard.user.openai.documents.all`
- `dashboard.admin.settings.openai.test`
- `dashboard.crm.customers.contacts.index`
- `dashboard.work.service-jobs.create-invoice`
- `dashboard.money.quotes.convert-job`

### Deviations

| Deviation | Example | File | Notes |
|-----------|---------|------|-------|
| No `dashboard.` prefix | `upload.image`, `pdf.getcontent`, `rss.fetch` | `panel.php` | Global utility routes outside dashboard group |
| No `dashboard.` prefix | `admin-vip-button`, `checkVipStatus` | `panel.php` | Auth-only but not dashboard-prefixed |
| Hard-coded full name | `dashboard.debug`, `dashboard.update.channel.convert` | `panel.php` | Added manually outside prefix groups |
| `titan.*` namespace | `titan.core.*`, `titan.memory.*`, `titan.mcp.*`, `titan.signal.*` | `core/*.routes.php` | Titan subsystems use their own namespace |
| `admin.titan.core.*` | `admin.titan.core.health` | `titan_admin.routes.php` | Admin Titan panel uses `admin.` prefix instead of `dashboard.admin.` |
| `titanrewind.*` | `titanrewind.cases.index` | `rewind.routes.php` | Missing `dashboard.user.` prefix |
| `api.signals.*` | `api.signals.ingest` | `api.php` | API signals use `api.` namespace ✓ |
| `api.titanrewind.*` | `api.titanrewind.cases.index` | `api.php` | API TitanRewind uses `api.` namespace ✓ |
| `pwa.*` | `pwa.manifest` | `pwa.routes.php` | PWA not under `dashboard.*` — intentional public prefix |

---

## Section 5: Dead / Missing Controllers

### 5.1 Missing Extension Controllers (from `social.routes.php`)

These classes are referenced in `routes/core/social.routes.php` but their source extension packages are not present on disk.

| Class | Route File | Status |
|-------|-----------|--------|
| `App\Extensions\AISocialMedia\System\Http\Controllers\Api\InstagramController` | `social.routes.php` | ❌ Missing |
| `App\Extensions\AISocialMedia\System\Http\Controllers\AutomationController` | `social.routes.php` | ❌ Missing |

| `App\Extensions\SocialMedia\System\Http\Controllers\SocialMediaCampaignController` | `social.routes.php` | ❌ Missing |

| `App\Extensions\SocialMedia\System\Http\Controllers\SocialMediaPostController` | `social.routes.php` | ❌ Missing |
| `App\Extensions\SocialMedia\System\Http\Controllers\SocialMediaSettingController` | `social.routes.php` | ❌ Missing |
| `App\Extensions\SocialMedia\System\Http\Controllers\SocialMediaUploadController` | `social.routes.php` | ❌ Missing |
| `App\Extensions\SocialMedia\System\Http\Controllers\SocialMediaVideoController` | `social.routes.php` | ❌ Missing |

**Impact:** All 30 missing classes will cause Laravel to throw a `BindingResolutionException` when any of these routes are resolved (not at boot time — only on request). This affects the entire `social.routes.php` file.

### 5.2 Confirmed Present

All controllers referenced in `web.php`, `api.php`, `auth.php`, `webhooks.php`, `panel.php`, `crm.routes.php`, `money.routes.php`, `work.routes.php`, `team.routes.php`, `support.routes.php`, `insights.routes.php`, `pwa.routes.php`, `signals.routes.php`, `rewind.routes.php`, `mcp.routes.php`, `titan_admin.routes.php`, `titan_core.routes.php` resolve to existing files.
